ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Decision Tree, Random Forest) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the model */,
  "training_data_version" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the training data used */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., training, trained, deployed) */,
  "last_trained_at" TEXT /* The last time the model was trained */,
  "last_evaluated_at" TEXT /* The last time the model was evaluated */,
  "ensemble_type" TEXT /* Type of ensemble if the model is part of one */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for training the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "learning_evaluation_instances" INTEGER /* Number of instances used in the learning evaluation */,
  "evaluation_time" REAL /* Time taken for the evaluation in CPU seconds */,
  "model_cost" REAL /* Cost of the model in RAM-Hours */,
  "classified_instances" INTEGER /* Number of instances classified */,
  "classifications_correct" REAL /* Percentage of correct classifications */,
  "kappa_statistic" REAL /* Kappa statistic as a percentage */,
  "kappa_temporal_statistic" REAL /* Kappa temporal statistic as a percentage */,
  "kappa_m_statistic" REAL /* Kappa M statistic as a percentage */,
  "f1_score_class_0" REAL /* F1 score for class 0 as a percentage */,
  "f1_score_class_1" REAL /* F1 score for class 1 as a percentage */,
  "recall_class_0" REAL /* Recall for class 0 as a percentage */,
  "recall_class_1" REAL /* Recall for class 1 as a percentage */,
  "gmean" REAL /* GMean as a percentage */,
  "training_data_version" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the training data used */,
  "evaluation_version" INTEGER /* Version of the evaluation */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix for detailed performance analysis */,
  "roc_auc_score" REAL /* ROC AUC score */,
  "precision_class_0" REAL /* Precision for class 0 */,
  "precision_class_1" REAL /* Precision for class 1 */,
  "f1_score_macro" REAL /* Macro-averaged F1 score */,
  "f1_score_micro" REAL /* Micro-averaged F1 score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource usage record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "model_training_instances" INTEGER /* Number of instances used for model training */,
  "model_serialized_size" INTEGER /* Size of the serialized model in bytes */,
  "ensemble_size" INTEGER /* Size of the ensemble (number of models in the ensemble) */,
  "size_class_0" REAL /* Size of class 0 */,
  "size_class_1" REAL /* Size of class 1 */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during model training */,
  "gpu_usage" REAL /* GPU usage during model training */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage during model training */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during model training */,
  "training_duration" REAL /* Duration of the training process */,
  "training_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training process */,
  "training_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_resources_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tree_metrics" (
  "tree_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tree metric record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "avg_tree_size_nodes" REAL /* Average size of the tree in nodes */,
  "err_tree_size_nodes" REAL /* Error in the average size of the tree in nodes */,
  "avg_tree_size_leaves" REAL /* Average size of the tree in leaves */,
  "err_tree_size_leaves" REAL /* Error in the average size of the tree in leaves */,
  "avg_active_learning_leaves" REAL /* Average number of active learning leaves */,
  "err_active_learning_leaves" REAL /* Error in the average number of active learning leaves */,
  "avg_tree_depth" REAL /* Average depth of the tree */,
  "err_tree_depth" REAL /* Error in the average depth of the tree */,
  "max_tree_depth" REAL /* Maximum depth of the tree */,
  "min_tree_depth" REAL /* Minimum depth of the tree */,
  "min_tree_size_nodes" REAL /* Minimum size of the tree in nodes */,
  "max_tree_size_nodes" REAL /* Maximum size of the tree in nodes */,
  "min_tree_size_leaves" REAL /* Minimum size of the tree in leaves */,
  "max_tree_size_leaves" REAL /* Maximum size of the tree in leaves */,
  "avg_tree_size_edges" REAL /* Average size of the tree in edges */,
  "err_tree_size_edges" REAL /* Error in the average size of the tree in edges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tree_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaf_metrics" (
  "leaf_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaf metric record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "avg_active_leaf_byte_size" REAL /* Average size of active leaf nodes in bytes */,
  "err_active_leaf_byte_size" REAL /* Error in the average size of active leaf nodes in bytes */,
  "avg_inactive_leaf_byte_size" REAL /* Average size of inactive leaf nodes in bytes */,
  "err_inactive_leaf_byte_size" REAL /* Error in the average size of inactive leaf nodes in bytes */,
  "avg_byte_size_estimate_overhead" REAL /* Average overhead in byte size estimate */,
  "err_byte_size_estimate_overhead" REAL /* Error in the average overhead in byte size estimate */,
  "avg_active_leaf_depth" REAL /* Average depth of active leaf nodes */,
  "err_active_leaf_depth" REAL /* Error in the average depth of active leaf nodes */,
  "avg_inactive_leaf_depth" REAL /* Average depth of inactive leaf nodes */,
  "err_inactive_leaf_depth" REAL /* Error in the average depth of inactive leaf nodes */,
  "avg_active_leaf_count" REAL /* Average count of active leaf nodes */,
  "err_active_leaf_count" REAL /* Error in the average count of active leaf nodes */,
  "avg_inactive_leaf_count" REAL /* Average count of inactive leaf nodes */,
  "err_inactive_leaf_count" REAL /* Error in the average count of inactive leaf nodes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaf_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaf_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "version_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, active, deprecated) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "training_data_version" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the training data used */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for the version */,
  "model_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the access event */,
  "access_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., metadata, configuration) */,
  "property_source" TEXT /* Source of the property (e.g., user input, system generated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_properties_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
